ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "beer_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the beer */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume (ABV) percentage */,
  "ibu" INTEGER /* International bitterness units (IBU) */,
  "ounces" INTEGER /* Ounces per serving */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewery producing the beer */,
  "serving_size_ml" INTEGER /* Serving size in milliliters */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* Main ingredients of the beer */,
  "serving_temperature_celsius" REAL /* Ideal serving temperature in Celsius */,
  "bottle_type" TEXT /* Type of bottle (e.g., 12 oz, 22 oz, keg) */,
  "label_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the beer label image */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the beer is organic */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the beer is gluten-free */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "brewery_name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the brewery is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the brewery is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brewery */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the brewery */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brewery's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brewery was founded */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the brewery */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brewery produces organic beers */,
  "is_certified_sustainable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brewery is certified as sustainable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beer style */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the style */,
  "abv_range_low" REAL /* Lower range of ABV for the style */,
  "abv_range_high" REAL /* Upper range of ABV for the style */,
  "ibu_range_low" INTEGER /* Lower range of IBU for the style */,
  "ibu_range_high" INTEGER /* Upper range of IBU for the style */,
  "serving_temperature_celsius" REAL /* Ideal serving temperature for the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer in inventory */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery managing the inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beer currently in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the beer is stored */,
  "shelf_life_days" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the beer in days */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the beer to trigger a new production run */,
  "last_production_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last production run for the beer */,
  "next_production_run_date" TEXT /* Planned date for the next production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_last_production_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_production_run_id") REFERENCES production_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production run */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being produced */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery producing the beer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of the production run */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beer produced in this run */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Unique batch number for the production run */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the production run */,
  "quality_control_passed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the production run passed quality control */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the beer should be stored (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the distributor's website */,
  "service_areas" TEXT /* Areas where the distributor operates */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the distributor is preferred */,
  "average_delivery_time_days" INTEGER /* Average time it takes for the distributor to deliver orders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor placing the order */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beer ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be delivered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order status */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the default status */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (for UI purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Brewer, Distributor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store role-specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role in the system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1 to 5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., consumer, distributor, brewery staff) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating how helpful the review is */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
